note: Added persistent IFNET admin, physical, and protocol status fields. Interface snapshots now refresh physical/admin/protocol facts into IFNET state; IP updates protocol state before RM/FIB refresh; RM and DPlane input consume IFNET status accessors instead of rebuilding state ad hoc in show paths.
